purpose: Phase 19 Lead Magnet / Capture Engine for Matrix Reprogrammed. This defines public opt-in routes that connect free briefs, Netlify forms, offer routes, campaigns, share kits, trust pages, evidence pages, and reader paths into email-capture journeys.
rules: Lead magnet pages must not make claims stronger than their linked evidence pages.
Every opt-in page must include a trust route and privacy route.
Every opt-in page must include a clear promise and a public route after signup.
Lead magnets are public download assets, not private subscriber data.
Netlify forms must use unique names for every lead magnet.
Capture pages should move readers from free value into offer and book routes without hiding source boundaries.

magnets.title: The Black File Starter Brief
magnets.label: Starter opt-in
magnets.summary: A short entry brief for readers who want the Matrix Reprogrammed map, evidence boundary, Black File route, and first book path.
magnets.promise: Get the clean starting route into the archive without losing the source boundary.

magnets.title: D.O.G Architect Initiation Brief
magnets.label: D.O.G opt-in
magnets.summary: A symbolic reader brief for D.O.G The Architect, claim labels, symbolic power, and the collector-volume offer route.
magnets.promise: Get the symbolic route into D.O.G without confusing interpretation for proof.

magnets.title: Intelligence Files Starter Brief
magnets.label: Agency opt-in
magnets.summary: A declassified-history starter brief for readers entering the intelligence dossiers, agency maps, and source-methodology pages.
magnets.promise: Get the agency archive route with declassified-source boundaries intact.

magnets.title: Crime Network Starter Brief
magnets.label: Crime dossier opt-in
magnets.summary: A reader brief for organized crime, cartel logistics, court records, sanctions, and crime-state overlap routes.
magnets.promise: Get the crime-network route while keeping association, indictment, sanction, and conviction boundaries clear.

magnets.title: Trust And Evidence Checklist
magnets.label: Credibility opt-in
magnets.summary: A credibility checklist for source hierarchy, claim labels, corrections, association boundaries, and evidence-vault navigation.
magnets.promise: Get the source-discipline checklist before entering the darker archive routes.

magnets.title: Full Archive Map
magnets.label: Full-system opt-in
magnets.summary: A broad map for readers who want books, offers, launches, share kits, feeds, download packs, and evidence routes in one pathway.
magnets.promise: Get the full map of the Matrix Reprogrammed archive and the cleanest route through it.
